headerDisplay:
## Hubspace Platform

Sign in with your Hubspace (Home Depot) account. Tokens are cached locally — you will **not** be re-prompted on every restart.
footerDisplay: See the [README](https://github.com/ctrlcmdshft/homebridge-hubspace-platform#readme) for full documentation and troubleshooting tips.

pollingInterval.title: Polling Interval (seconds)
pollingInterval.description: Fallback poll interval in seconds. When Conclave push is active (default), this is floored at 300 s — real-time updates come via Conclave regardless. Only matters if Conclave is disabled.

tokenCachePath.title: Token Cache Path (advanced)
tokenCachePath.description: Override the path for the cached auth token file. Leave blank to use the Homebridge storage directory (recommended).

debug.title: Enable Debug Logging
debug.description: Log verbose state values on every poll cycle and API request/response details. Useful when troubleshooting device control issues.

exposeComfortBreeze.title: Expose Comfort Breeze Switch
exposeComfortBreeze.description: Show Comfort Breeze as a separate HomeKit switch tile for supported fans. When disabled (default), Comfort Breeze is hidden and the fan tile tap toggles power directly.

exposeMasterPowerSwitch.title: Expose Master Power Switch
exposeMasterPowerSwitch.description: Show the ceiling-fan master power (power[primary]) as a separate HomeKit switch tile. Only applies to fans that have a dedicated fan-power field alongside a master power field.

exposeStatusFault.title: Expose Status Fault on Fans and Lights
exposeStatusFault.description: Show a fault indicator on fan and light tiles when a device goes offline. Non-standard per HAP spec — visible in third-party HomeKit apps (Eve, Controller for HomeKit); may not display in Apple Home.

disableConclave.title: Disable Conclave Push
disableConclave.description: Disable the real-time Conclave push connection and fall back to polling only. Use this if you experience persistent connection issues.
